title: Gramlr
compiled_truth: Gramlr is an external contact at [Pjm](companies/pjm). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2000-09-26), Gramlr sent 30 and received 43 emails, totalling 73 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (22), [Doornbos](people/doornbos-socrates) (13), [Amosher](people/amosher-appanet) (11), [Lfried](people/lfried-uclink) (11), [Whederman](people/whederman-columbiaenergygroup) (10).
timeline:
